author: doll-agent
content: Added 9 windows (cosine, exponential, gaussian, general_cosine, general_hamming, nuttall, parzen, taylor, tukey) to ferray-window/src/windows/mod.rs. 22 new tests, all 52 ferray-window tests pass. Clippy clean (-D warnings). Workspace version bumped 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1. Committed as f6fc8199. Ready for cargo publish.
